workOrder.summary: Add a second student-safe View timeline shortcut to Submitted Work rows.
workOrder.selectionReason: The previous handoff pointed at student submission rows, and current workspace.js still rendered Submitted Work rows as status summaries plus latest feedback text even though the student-safe /api/reviews/:submissionId/history route and timeline renderer already existed.

repoGroundedFindings: workspace.js already reused /api/reviews/:submissionId/history for Feedback History rows through openStudentFeedbackHistory().
renderSubmissionRow() still rendered Submitted Work rows without any route-backed way to reopen version, status-change, and visible-note history from the submission list.
The student-safe timeline route already filters staff-only comments, so the safest slice was a second shortcut into the same scoped history rather than a new route or page.
changes: Added View timeline actions to Submitted Work rows in workspace.js.
Tracked whether the shared student history state was opened from Feedback History or Submitted Work rows so the timeline renders only in the originating surface.
Reused the existing student-safe timeline renderer and /api/reviews/:submissionId/history route instead of adding a new route, query param, or permission path.
Added focused workspace coverage proving the submission-row shortcut opens one timeline panel without duplicating the feedback panel.
nextRecommended: Run hosted section-level permission proof when hosted fake-account proof and audit-event writes are allowed; otherwise deepen the student workspace with phase-specific progress detail from the existing dashboard payload.
